description: Use this API to restore the network working case back to its original state; the state prior to all “Isolate By Breaker” actions that have been taken. Caution: Any network changes that may have been made since the initial “Isolate” action will be lost. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.1.0. restorestatesfromisolate(ierr)

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
